case_title: INFORMATION STRATEGIES CORPORATION VS HERMAN, DONALD/HERMAN ACCOUNTANCY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HERMAN, DONALD/HERMAN ACCOUNTANCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT INFORMATION STRATEGIES CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
